info.name: ModularIoT Metrics API
info.description:
API collection for sending telemetry data with metrics to ModularIoT using the miot.metrics@1.0 schema.

## Setup

1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create an environment with the following variables:
   - `base_url`: https://iot.streamhub.cl
   - `auth_url`: https://api.microboxlabs.com/api/v1/login
   - `client_id`: Your client ID
   - `client_secret`: Your client secret
   - `audience`: https://iot.streamhub.cl/v1/asset/track
3. Run the "Login" request first to get an access token
4. The token will be automatically saved and used in subsequent requests

## Documentation

See https://docs.modulariot.io/integration/api-reference/asset-track for full API documentation.

request.description: Authenticate with Auth0 to get an access token. The token is automatically saved to the collection variables.
Basic example sending GPS location with common OBD2 metrics including engine RPM, coolant temperature, battery voltage, vehicle speed, fuel level, and MIL status.
Example showing multiple timestamped metrics in a single request. Useful for devices that buffer data and send in batches. Each metric item can have its own timestamp (ts) override.

body.raw:
{
  "asset_id": "SVSX88",
  "type": "Truck",
  "owner": "MicroboxLabs",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-02T16:00:00Z",
  "gps": {
    "latitude": -33.452178,
    "longitude": -70.639845,
    "altitude": 498,
    "speed": 0,
    "heading": 90,
    "satellites": 16
  },
  "telecom": {
    "iccid": "8956012345678901234",
    "imei": "123456789012345",
    "signal_strength": -67
  },
  "sensors": {
    "engine_status": true,
    "ignition": true,
    "door_open": false
  },
  "metrics": {
    "schema": "miot.metrics@1.0",
    "items": [
      { "k": "engine.rpm", "v": 850, "u": "rpm", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "engine.coolant_temp", "v": 88, "u": "C", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "engine.intake_air_temp", "v": 32, "u": "C", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "engine.load", "v": 18, "u": "%", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "engine.runtime", "v": 7245, "u": "s", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "vehicle.speed", "v": 0, "u": "km/h", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "throttle.position", "v": 12, "u": "%", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "battery.voltage", "v": 14.2, "u": "V", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "fuel.level", "v": 68, "u": "%", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "fuel.rate", "v": 1.8, "u": "L/h", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "vehicle.odometer", "v": 142587, "u": "km", "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "idle.state", "v": true, "src": "derived", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "dtc.mil_on", "v": false, "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" },
      { "k": "dtc.count", "v": 0, "src": "obd2", "q": "ok" }
    ],
    "seq": 100003,
    "device_ts": "2026-02-02T16:00:00Z",
    "capabilities": {
      "obd2": true,
      "can": false,
      "supported_pids": ["04", "05", "0C", "0D", "0F", "11", "1F", "2F", "42"]
    }
  }
}

request.description: Comprehensive example with GPS, telecom, sensors, and extensive metrics including engine data, fuel consumption, odometer, idling detection, and device capabilities. This represents a full-featured OBD2 integration.
Example showing diagnostic trouble codes (DTCs) with check engine light on. Includes the MIL status, DTC count, and array of fault codes with optional metadata for descriptions.
